name: scope
description: | Use when the user has a clear-enough task and wants it decomposed into batched worker sub-tasks before any code is written. Writes a task file under .hyperflow/tasks/ and auto-chains into /hyperflow:dispatch. Trigger with /hyperflow:scope, "plan this", "decompose this task", "break this down", "write the task file".
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 在动手写代码前，把一个明确的任务拆解成可批量分发的子任务，生成任务文件并自动衔接后续执行流程，适合需要规划和并行处理的复杂开发场景。
